name: @mrivoe/themes
description: Universal single-source theme token system with multi-target exporters

scripts.validate:midnight: node src/validate-theme.js themes/midnight/theme.json themes/midnight/semantic.json themes/midnight/components.json themes/midnight/icons.json themes/midnight/resources.json
scripts.validate:fluent-cyberpunk: node src/validate-theme.js themes/fluent-cyberpunk/theme.json themes/fluent-cyberpunk/semantic.json themes/fluent-cyberpunk/components.json themes/fluent-cyberpunk/icons.json themes/fluent-cyberpunk/resources.json
